raw_text: I have recieved less number of items from the order multiple times. One time they refunded me the difference, last time they didn't. The employees working at the store packing the items are making you bankrupt by stealing items and not delivering all items to the customer. Uninstalled the app after Support representative didn't understand my concern and didn't provide any refund for the item I never received. I've lost money as a result.

Blinkit has made grocery shopping incredibly convenient. The delivery is consistently fast, and the app is easy to navigate with a wide range of products available. I especially appreciate the fresh produce and reliable packaging. While some items occasionally go out of stock during peak hours, the overall experience has been smooth and time-saving. A great option for anyone looking for quick and hassle-free deliveries.

Turning out to be the worst app day by day. First they gave me a coupon for 1 week free nongshim but I was not able to redeem it. I raised a complaint then after a few hours the coupon just disappeared without any trace. It really ruined my experience. edit: no resolution given when I contacted support they were just trying to prove me wrong.

I order from Blinkit regularly, yet almost every delivery partner calls multiple times asking where my location is, even though it's correctly pinned in the app. Some even ask me to come downstairs to collect my order. This defeats the purpose of doorstep delivery. Please resolve your location mapping issues and ensure a better customer experience.

Purchased the ANT Esports Wi-Fi Adapter from Blinkit on 20 May 2026. The adapter worked properly for only about a month before it stopped detecting Wi-Fi networks, making it unusable. This is especially disappointing because the product is advertised with a 1-year brand warranty. A Wi-Fi adapter should not develop issues within a few weeks of normal use. I would appreciate a refund or a better replacement.

Worst service ever. This is my least favorite app to use. They don't provide immediate returns when something is ordered by mistake. On top of that, they often sends incorrect orders, causing inconvenience to customers. When they make a mistake, they simply say "sorry." But when a customer missorder something, they start talking about rules and policies. Should provide immediate return option for selected items.

Blinkit has made grocery shopping incredibly convenient. The app is easy to use, offers a wide range of products, and delivers orders very quickly. Most of my orders arrive within minutes, and the items are usually fresh and well-packed. The delivery partners are polite, and the real-time tracking feature is helpful. While some products can occasionally be out of stock, the overall experience is excellent. Highly recommended for anyone looking for fast and reliable grocery delivery.

I cancelled an order worth approximately ₹266, but the refund was not credited back to my original payment method. Instead, Blinkit issued the amount as a coupon without providing any option to choose between a refund to the source account and store credit. This approach is disappointing, as customers should have the right to decide how they receive their refund. Moreover, the coupon issued is not easy to utilize, making the situation even more inconvenient.

don't buy from blinkit. it was all good before, but nowadays they are scamming there customers. I had received twice or thrice the different item from which I had ordered and even after complaining, they send me again other item instead of the one I ordered. That was ok , coz atleast I got something from the money I used. But recently I had ordered few items from the blinkit , but one of the item was missing. even after complaining they dint resolve my issue. N took my money.worst app!!!

Very disappointing experience. My order was accepted, a rider was assigned, and after making me wait for a long time the order got cancelled. It was already very late at night, and because of this I could not arrange food elsewhere easily. Support was unable to provide any proper solution or replacement order. This caused unnecessary stress, inconvenience, and wasted my time completely.

Missing items in an order is a common issue with most online delivery portals, most of them acknowledge and issue a refund automatically. All except Blinkit. It has happened to me multiple times in the past, with the most recent instance being 45 minutes back. They will sit on it silently, praying that the customer does not notice. Either their systems are broken to allow for issue discovery, or they have adopted this as a policy to cut their losses at the expense of the customer. Buyer beware!

The customer PAYS for an item -> Receives an EMPTY box -> The support team says; "I understand your point of view. If I were in your position, I would feel the same, but trust me, it is not possible from our end to cater to this request, as we have confirmed from the delivery team that all items have been delivered to you."

An unsealed intimate item was delivered , when raised concern with support , they said it's just packing issues , and we guarantee it's safe to use. I mean how can they even give such a surety, in short don't expect any standard I throwed away the product. Something are unacceptable and Blinkit should uphold basic standards. Application is great 👍🏻 ,

Very disappointing experience with Blinkit. I ordered a cake, but when I opened the package, several pieces were missing. The package had already been opened before it was delivered to me, which is completely unacceptable. This raises serious concerns about quality control and hygiene. I expected a sealed and complete product, but this was not what I received.

it's very impressive that they are really very punctual. as accord to me, everything I got was very fine. and books, I thought it would be pirated, but it was real copy with no damage. but I suggest if you could stock the book's complete series instead of famous books alone. you don't have to stock all books, but atleast stock the series you have alone. because I trust that you give the right books in right time, so please, blinkit, please finish the series alone. I kindly expect a reply😊

Extremely disappointing service. I received a product that was not in proper condition, but instead of resolving the issue, customer support kept repeating the same responses and dragged the complaint on for hours. I was asked for explanations and details again and again for a very simple issue. As a customer, I paid full price for the product and expected to receive it in proper condition. Instead, I was left wasting my time trying to convince support that there was a genuine problem

blinkit sent me a defective product and now they are making a lot of fuss about exchanging it. I am worried since yesterday but I have not received my exchange product. if there is any issue with the product then it only shows that your order has been placed but there is an issue with the delivery. And since yesterday these people are saying the same thing, when I placed another product, it got placed easily and is coming also it's mean that they were making excuses when I try to exchange.

one star is just because it does actually works, and delivery your order request. Besides that, the customer service is trash. I received a C-C cable, and it won't connect to any device. Both the ends were loosen. I talked to 2 executives (first one just disconnected herself with letting me know) I send multiple videos showing the issues, but only they said that the product is all fine it's my device which is defective. I tried that cable in multiple devices. yet they refused to refund.

I've been using Blinkit for a long time, and it has never disappointed me. The delivery is always super fast, products are fresh, and the app is very easy to use. Customer support is also quick and helpful whenever needed. It has made grocery shopping so convenient. Highly recommended❤️

I placed an order of around 5-6 items on 7th july all fully available after ordering the items ( I prepaid for the order ) around 8-10 mins later they shows that 1 item is unavailable and for that inconvenience we will refund you the money ( it was 275 rupees ) in 3-5 days and I have being checking from the last 2-3 days that if they did the refund or not today on 12th July I checked on the app its showing that they have returned the money but I have received none & not allowing me to complain
